title: Keel Toys Keeleco Rabbit 19cm
features: Bunny - Keeleco offers a range of incredibly soft eco-friendly plush toys, kids will love cuddling and snuggling up to them. You will love imagining incredible adventures and turning these cuddly toys into real toys. Convenient size and easy to carry.
ECO FRIENDLY - 100% RECYCLED - Eco-friendly plush, made with 100% recycled plastic waste.
Easy to wash – in case of a small incident, you only need to clean your plush toy with a damp cloth.
Complies with European standards: Keeleco items are made from high quality materials and fully compliant with European toy safety standards.
